task_updates.executor_notes: Migrated the provider, all app consumers, and the existing context-targeted tests onto the provider-scoped timeline store selectors and mounted availability boundary. `VideoEditorProvider` now renders only the store provider plus provider-local orchestration, syncs its lightbox-augmented ops back into the store, and keeps pending-add, AgentChat, lightbox, and navigation behavior local per the earlier audit. `useAddToVideoEditor` now uses the safe store hooks so the staged-vs-mounted add contract stays intact, `TimelineCanvas` consumes only the store-backed mutable adapters, and the old context/helper files were deleted only after a clean grep confirmed no remaining imports. Verification: `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false`; `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineCanvas.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/__tests__/PreviewPersistence.test.tsx`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. All live app consumers and the three context-mocking test files were moved onto the timeline-store selectors or safe selector boundary, `useAddToVideoEditor` still distinguishes mounted editor state from staged localStorage fallback through the safe store hooks, and the three legacy context files plus `useTimelineState.contexts.ts` were deleted only after grep confirmed no remaining imports.
